titleStmt.title: SII 9.645: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 645. (A.R. No. 29 of 1917.) ON A STONE SET UP IN THE COURT-YARD OF THE MAILARESVARA TEMPLE AT PATASIVARAM, MADAKASIRA TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1473, Virōdhikṛit, Āśvīja, śu. 10 corresponding to A.D. 1551 October 9, Friday (not verifiable), in the reign of Sadāśivarāya-Mahārāya. It records that Koṇḍarājayya's son (name lost) made a gift of land, free from all taxes, in the presence of the god Viṭhaladēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrījayādbhudayaśālivāhanaśa
kavarṣaṁgaḷu 1473 neya virōdhikrutusaṁvatsarada Ā
śvīja śu 10 lu śrīma(ṁ)n mahāmaṁḍalēśvara rājādhirā
ja rājaparamēśvara vīrapratāpa śrīsadāśivarāyamahā
li prutvīrājyaṁgaiuttaṁ yira
koṁḍarājaiyyanavara komāra A
mahāarasugaḷu koṭṭa dharmaśāsana kramaveṁ
vēṁṭheyakke saluva niḍugalla sīmeyoḷage viṭha
namage Uṁbaḷiyāgi pālista hiriyasivarada ke
dāyada gade sarvamānyavāgi koṭṭa saṁ
dāyada gadegaḷige naneyakki bēḍige meḍu
dali viṭhaladēvara sa(ṁ)nnidhiyali sahira(ṁ)ṇyōda
dhāreyaneradu koṭṭa dharmaśāsana
tamma mātāpitrugaḷanū
vadhisida pāpadali hōharu gaṁgetaḍiyali
koṁda pāpadali hōharu śrī śrī śrī
svadattādviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ paradattā
pahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . dānapālanaStops here.
Digital edition of SII 9.645 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
